name: magpie-marketplace
description: A collection of shiny, useful Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: archaeology
plugins.description: Dig through Claude Code session history — survey projects, extract domain patterns, analyse workstyles, and conserve narrative artifacts

plugins.name: unicode-library
plugins.description: Curated Unicode character library for CLI visual design

plugins.name: claude-code-development-kit
plugins.description: Complete toolkit for building Claude Code extensions - skills, commands, plugins, and supporting infrastructure. Includes guides for skill authoring, prompt engineering, command creation, plugin development, and memory management.

plugins.name: expert-review
plugins.description: Spawn expert sub-agents to review, iterate, and improve work at checkpoints. Supports parallel expert reviews with conflict resolution via domain precedence.

plugins.name: iterative-usability
plugins.description: Agents that improve how Claude Code explores codebases and researches topics — writing persistent findings to disk instead of bloating the main context window.

plugins.name: knowledge-harvester
plugins.description: Multi-agent knowledge harvesting, validation, and synthesis from multiple sources

plugins.name: mode-plugin
plugins.description: Persistent interaction modes for Claude Code responses - creative brainstorming, challenger stress-testing, and teaching explanations.

plugins.name: gen-plugin
plugins.description: One-shot artifact generators for different output formats - executive briefs, technical deep dives, and talking points.

plugins.name: quality-assurance-toolkit
plugins.description: Validation and quality assurance tools for plugins and skills

plugins.name: orchestration-toolkit
plugins.description: Agent orchestration patterns for Claude Code - subagents, parallel agents, phased workflows, and collaborative agent teams.

plugins.name: plugin-profile
plugins.description: Auto-detect project type and configure Claude Code plugins with profile management

plugins.name: session-budget
plugins.description: Scope estimator that scores tasks by complexity, caps sessions at ~8 points, and recommends splitting work across sessions when overloaded

plugins.name: session-autopilot
plugins.description: Automatic session continuity — handoff on exit, checkpoint on compact, resume on start
